violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Both Sani Buckets found at less 200ppm Quat. *Manually made sani bucket with ~1/2 tablespoon quat chemical to 2 quart water (1/2 gallon).

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Pre-cooked chicken thawing at room temperature in prep area. -Frozen egg patties thawing on top of oven.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Hot dogs had a thaw date of 2/17.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Heavy debris build up at back exterior surface of ice chute at soda machine.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sani dispenser does not appear to be working correctly-only has cold water line to feed dispenser. Did not observe any solutions made correctly from from dispenser. (Instructions require 200-400ppm Quat solution for sanitizing.)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
